questions.question: What is the most accurate description of 'OTP'?
options: electronic fund transfer processed in batches round the clock
operation to negate a previously processed transaction
one-time password used for transaction authentication
questions.explanation: OTP refers to: one-time password used for transaction authentication.

questions.question: What is the most accurate description of 'BBPS'?
options: electronic fund transfer processed in batches round the clock
person or entity initiating payment transaction
interoperable bill payment ecosystem under NPCI
event callback informing transaction status updates
questions.explanation: BBPS refers to: interoperable bill payment ecosystem under NPCI.

questions.question: Which Software Engineering concept best matches: set of object-oriented design principles for maintainable code?
questions.explanation: SOLID is defined as: set of object-oriented design principles for maintainable code.

questions.question: 'Control Unit' belongs mainly to which architecture area?
questions.explanation: Control Unit is mainly part of CPU Core.

questions.explanation: The requirement directly points to Aging.

questions.explanation: Only 'Incremental Model -> model delivering software in small functional increments' is correctly mapped.

questions.explanation: Backup is directly used for restoring data after corruption or ransomware events.

questions.explanation: Lazy Loading is defined as: deferring non-critical resource loading until needed.
